comment: Snapshot of pre-existing composition findings. Committed so the CI gate fails only on NEW findings. Re-snapshot via `python3 .github/scripts/composition.py baseline .`. Each entry should have a rationale comment alongside.

rationale.rust-manual-derivable|cms-pre-publish-au: AuditThresholds::default() returns Self { title_min: 4, title_max: 70, description_min: 50, description_max: 160 } — domain-specific non-zero defaults that #[derive(Default)] would replace with 0/0/0/0. The lint's TRIVIAL_BODY_LINE_BUDGET=10 heuristic flags any short manual impl regardless of whether the field values are derivable. Suppressed: keeping the non-zero defaults.
rationale.dry-duplicate-block|cms-core/Cargo.toml|: The 3-line block is the standard Rust workspace-inheritance pattern (`edition.workspace = true`, `rust-version.workspace = true`, `license.workspace = true`). Inherent to every workspace-member Cargo.toml — extracting would defeat the point of workspace inheritance. Suppressed: false positive on workspace idiom.

suppressed: dry-duplicate-block|cms-core/Cargo.toml|3+ identical-line block recurs 3 times across 3 files
